title: Better Crafting Table
description: Makes Crafting Table much better than vanilla
body:
Makes crafting table much better than vanilla :)

Old crafting table :
  * Raw
  * Doesn't fit to vanilla yet

New crafting table :
  * Nice
  * Much better
